title: sugkatapsephizo #4785
definition:
1) be depositing a ballot in the urn (i.e. by voting for) to
    assign one a place among, to vote one a place among
 2) to vote against with others, i.e. to condemn with others
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) be depositing a ballot in the urn (i.e. by voting for) to
    assign one a place among, to vote one a place among
 2) to vote against with others, i.e. to condemn with others

    NASB:  to condemn with, spec. to vote (one)  a place among:
